summary: Dashboard loading state shows proper mobile narrow layout with drawer navigation and core content structure, but violates brand palette consistency by using neutral gray backgrounds instead of the required diner aesthetic palette for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Dashboard uses generic neutral gray/white backgrounds instead of the required diner palette. Authenticated surfaces must share the same brand palette as public routes, but this shows a generic UI treatment that creates brand discontinuity after login.

actions: Apply diner palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces to maintain brand consistency across public and logged-in experiences
Replace neutral backgrounds with appropriate diner palette colors (cream #fff8ea for cards, teal accents where appropriate)
Ensure the pink CTA button treatment is applied to primary action buttons like 'Resend verification email'
